name: Ladybug

attacks.name: Assault
attacks.tell: Back up slightly and then charge straight at high speed
attacks.howToAvoid: Dodge laterally as he charges or block with a shield (if you have perfect timing)
attacks.notes: Travels a long distance, can stun the target if it connects

attacks.name: head blow
attacks.tell: He tilts his head back and then does a front headbutt
attacks.howToAvoid: Block or walk away; the range is short
attacks.notes: Frontal impact that can stun and do a lot of damage to the player

attacks.name: Side Lunge
attacks.tell: He turns his body slightly and charges sideways.
attacks.howToAvoid: Back away or move away to the opposite side of the attack
attacks.notes: Side blow more lethal than headbutt, strong enough to stun

attacks.name: aerial shake
attacks.tell: If a player is riding on top, the ladybug suddenly jumps up to shake him off.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not stay on the insect when it is aggressive
attacks.notes: Deals high damage to the player riding on his back.

attacks.name: Healing Roar
attacks.tell: Emits a loud roar and briefly glows
attacks.howToAvoid: N/A (it is not a direct attack, but it should be interrupted by hitting quickly)
attacks.notes: Does not harm the player; Ladybug heals ~150 health points when roaring

description: A sturdy yet neutral insect that roams the greener parts of the yard hunting aphids and resting under broad leaves.
behavior: It moves slowly, sometimes sleeps under dandelions, and can suddenly charge or body-check once a fight starts.
interactionWithPlayer: It stays neutral until attacked. If you climb onto its back, an enraged ladybug can try to buck you off.
interactionWithCreatures: It often chases aphids and turns hostile against anything that strikes it. Ladybug Bait can distract it and alter its route.
strategy: Fresh and busting damage still punish it best. Respect the long charge and avoid lingering behind it if you expect a buck.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Bite: 75
Running Charge: 120
Side Hit: 100
Back Buck: 130
